---
name: code-review-fixes-may-2026
description: What was fixed and deferred from the brutal code review in .output/code-review.md (May 2026)
metadata:
  type: project
---

Applied all Day 1 fixes and safe Week 1 wins from the code review in `.output/code-review.md`.

**Why:** Pre-demo quality pass; review was generated by /ultrareview or similar.

**How to apply:** The R1 (dual source-of-truth) and T1 (strict: true) refactors are the largest remaining items — tackle them together in a dedicated PR when scaling past ~100 nodes.

## Fixed

- **C1** — Deleted `src/App.css` (was unused Vite scaffold)
- **C2** — Rewrote README to match actual scenario-picker demo; moved PDF ingestion to roadmap
- **P8/V3** — `npm uninstall pdfjs-dist` (was never imported, ~1MB dead weight)
- **R2/P1** — Added `React.memo` to all 6 custom node components (DocumentNode, TopicNode, TagNode, PersonNode, MemoryNode, MessageNode)
- **T2/R12** — Added `BrainNodeData` interface to `types/graph.ts`; removed `[key: string]: unknown` from `BrainNode`; GraphCanvas now passes only `{ title, content, tags }` as node data instead of the full BrainNode
- **R4** — Hoisted `DIMMED_STYLE = { opacity: 0.3 }` to module scope in GraphCanvas (was recreated on every render)
- **R5** — Wrapped app in `<ReactFlowProvider>` in `main.tsx` so `useReactFlow()` is callable from any descendant
- **R7** — Added `const edgeTypes = {}` at module scope in GraphCanvas for future custom edges
- **T6** — Replaced `document.getElementById('root')!` with an explicit null check + throw in `main.tsx`
- **Z1** — Removed duplicate `const nodes = useGraphStore(...)` in App.tsx (was subscribed twice)
- **T4/V1** — Removed dead `@ai` and `@ui` path aliases from `vite.config.ts` and `tsconfig.json`
- **T3** — Removed `@types/*` path alias (conflicted with DefinitelyTyped namespace)
- **V4** — Changed `server.host` from `'0.0.0.0'` to `'localhost'` in vite.config.ts
- **C9** — Layout toggle buttons now use `disabled={layoutMode === 'free/auto'}` instead of conditional onClick
- **C11** — `nodes.css` import consolidated to GraphCanvas; removed from each of the 6 node files
- **C12** — Added bounds check in OnboardingTooltip (`STEPS[step]?.` + early return null)

## Deliberately deferred (with reason)

- **R1** — Dual source-of-truth (Zustand + useNodesState mirror): biggest perf/correctness win but requires coordinated changes across GraphCanvas, App, and the store. Do as a standalone PR.
- **T1** — `"strict": true` in tsconfig: would generate a cascade of null-check errors to fix across NodePanel, MiniPanel, App. Do alongside R1 so you catch type issues in the refactored code.
- **A1** — Split `handleSave` in NodePanel into store actions: valid but complex; zero risk to demo correctness today.
- **Z2/P3/P4/P5** — Store selectors for MiniPanel/NodePanel/SearchBar: good ergonomics win, low urgency.
- **P7/V2** — Vite chunk splitting / manualChunks: bundle is 558KB. Add when wiring up PDF ingestion (react-markdown + pdfjs-dist would push it over).
- **C7** — Replace `window.confirm` with in-app modal: cosmetic, low risk for demos.
